verses.text: Tua ciangin vantung mi in Pasian leh Tuuno tokhom panin a hong luangkhia, kristal suangmanpha bangin a te selsel gun tui hong lak a
khuapi sung lampi laizangah a luang hi. Tua gun pang tuakah nuntakna singkung po a, kha simin gah ahih manin kum khat sungin sawmlenih vei a gah hi. A tehte zong natna damna ding zatui-in kizang hi
Pasian' samsiatna a ngah peuhpeuh tua khuasungah omlo hi. Tua khuapi sungah Pasian leh Tuuno' tokhom om ding a, ama nasemte in amah a bia ding uh hi
Amaute in ama maitang mu ding uh a, a taltang tung uhah ama min kigelh ding hi
Topa Pasian pen amaute' khuavak hi-in, a tawntungin amaute in uk paisuak ding uh ahih manin khuamial hun cih om nawnlo ding a, khua a vaksak ding meivak leh nitaang cihte kisamlo ding uh hi.

Tua ciangin vantung mi in kei kiangah, “Hih thute muan'taak a, thuman ahi hi. Kamsangte tungah a Kha Siangtho a pia Topa Pasian in a hong piang baih ding thute, a nasemte tungah a lak dingin a vantung mite a hong sawl hi,” hong ci hi
Jesuh in, “Kei a hong pai baihta ding ka hi hi. Hih laibu sunga kigelh thu a zui mite mi hampha ahi hi,” a hong ci hi
Keimah Johan in hih thute za-in ka muh ahi hi. Hih thute za-in ka muh ciangin hih thute kei tungah a hong lak vantung mi a bia dingin a khe phungah ka boksuk hi
Ahi zongin amah in, “Kei hong bia kei in. Kei pen nang leh na sanggamte, leh hih laibu sungah a om thu a zui mite tawh nasemkhawm khat ka hi hi. Pasian bia in,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin vantung mi in kei kiangah, “Hih laibu sungah a kigelh thute a tun'ding hong naita ahih manin imcip kei in
A gilo mite gilo lailai hen la, a kihhuai gamtatte kihhuai gamtat lailai hen la, a hoih gamtatte hoih gamtat lailai hen la, a siangtho mite a siangtho mah hi lailai ta hen!” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Kei ka hong pai baihta ding a, mi khempeuh a gamtatna uh tawh kizui-in a thaman ding uh ka hong puak ding hi
Kei pen a masa leh a nunung, a kipatna leh a tawpna a cihnopna ahi Alfa leh Omega ka hi hi,” a hong ci hi
Khuapi kulhkongpi sungah a luttheihna ding leh nuntakna singgah a nektheihna dingun a puan uh a siangin a sawp mite, mi hampha ahi uh hi
Ahi zongin a lampial mite, aisan mite, a paktat mite, mi thatte, milim biate, leh zuaugen nuamsa-in zuau a gengen mite, khuapi pualamah a om uh hi
“Keimah Jesuh in pawlpite-a' dingin hih thute nang kiangah a hong gen dingin ka vantung mi ka hong sawl hi. Kei pen David' zung leh a suan ahi, zingsol ka hi hi,” a hong ci hi

Kha Siangtho leh Mothak in Jesuh kiangah, “Hong pai in,” a ci uh hi. Hih thu a za mi khempeuh in zong Jesuh aw, “Hong pai in,” ci ta uh hen. A dangtak mi khempeuh hong pai uh hen la, a deih khempeuh in nuntakna tui a khongin hong la ta uh hen

Keimah Johan in hih laibu sungah a kigelh thu a za mi khempeuh ka hong hilhkholh nopna panin: A thu a behlap na om uh leh Pasian in zong hih laibu sungah a kigelh gimnate note tungah hong behlap ding a

hih laibu sungah a kigelh thute a hemkhia na om uh leh Pasian in zong hih laibu sungah a kigelh nuntakna singgah leh Khuapi Siangtho sungah na ngahding uh hamphatnate note kiang panin hong hepkhiatsak ding hi
Hih thu khempeuh hong genin teci a pang mipa in, “Ka hong pai baih taktak ding hi,” hong ci hi. Na cih bangin hi ta peuh hen. Topa Jesuh aw, hong pai ta in
Topa Jesuh hong hehpihna thupha, note khempeuh tungah hong om ta hen. Amen.
